message:
style(node): apply rustfmt line-width fixes across control lane mapping,
main imports, and trust card registry

Format-only changes to satisfy rustfmt line width limits:
- control_lane_mapping.rs: break long function signature and assert_eq!
  macro calls across multiple lines in test functions
- main.rs: reformat trust_card import list to comply with line width
- trust_card.rs: collapse short method chain onto single line

No logic changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
